description.ko: 미래 기술과 심해 해구의 생물 발광 생명체가 만나는 고요하면서도 신비로운 수중 장면입니다.
description.en: A serene yet mysterious underwater scene where futuristic technology meets the bioluminescent life of the deepest ocean trenches.

prompt: A cinematic ultra-detailed shot of AQUA-5, titled 'The Abyssal Cathedral.' A cluster of glowing modular research spheres submerged in the dark #000080 midnight zone. Surrounding the station are massive #40E0D0 bioluminescent jellyfish and glowing #48D1CC coral that pulse with soft light. The #006994 water is heavy and pressurized, filled with floating marine snow and micro-bubbles. High-tech floodlights from the modules illuminate the rugged, trench-like ocean floor. 8k resolution, photorealistic, capturing the peaceful dance of transparent life in the deep sea.
